prompt: Generate a stacked bar chart showing daily energy usage by appliance. Use Image 1 and 2 as the icons in the legend to represent each appliance.
prompt_refined: Generate a stacked bar chart illustrating daily energy usage, specifically broken down by the Refrigerator and Washing Machine appliances. Display a legend to the right of the chart. For the 'Refrigerator' category in the legend, use Image 1 (a silver Samsung refrigerator) as its icon. For the 'Washing Machine' category, use Image 2 (a silver LG front-load washing machine) as its icon.
objects: legend to the right of the chart
silver Samsung refrigerator icon in the legend
silver LG front-load washing machine icon in the legend
"Washing Machine" category text in the legend
bars representing Washing Machine energy usage
